summary: School Detail Page Enhancement Testing Complete - All NEW features working correctly. Tested on Marshall University (on board, match score 79) and Alfred University (not on board). All decision guidance features implemented and functioning.

issues: Border width shows as 1px in computed styles for 'On Your Board' state, but 2.5px class is correctly applied for 'Add to Pipeline' state. This is expected behavior - disabled state has thinner border.

critical_code_review_comments: All helper functions for micro labels correctly implemented (selectivityLabel, sizeLabel, gradQuality, retentionQuality, ratioQuality)
Decision summary (buildDecisionSummary) correctly generates contextual text based on match data
Fit summary (buildFitSummary) generates appropriate summary sentence above bullets
Next step (buildNextStep) correctly differentiates between boarded (email CTA) and non-boarded (pipeline CTA) schools
Why This School section has ochre-tinted background (rgba(139, 63, 31, 0.04)) and subtle border
Section titles use text-lg sm:text-xl for larger size
Dividers use my-12 md:my-16 for increased spacing
Coaching staff rows have hover:bg-[var(--cm-surface-2)]/50 for hover effect
Coach email links have hover:text-[#8B3F1F] and hover:bg-[#8B3F1F]/5 for primary action styling
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Detail Page enhancements complete. All decision guidance features working: Hero decision summary in ochre, Why This School with summary sentence and ochre background, Recommended Next Step with contextual CTAs, Quick Snapshot micro labels, Coaching Staff hover effects, larger section titles, increased divider spacing.
